mapper.select: SELECT instance_id FROM monitor_instance ORDER BY instance_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cpu_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, total_connections, active_connections, idle_connections, idle_in_transaction, waiting_sessions, waiting_for_lock, waiting_for_io, wait_event_client, wait_event_activity, wait_event_bufferpin, wait_event_lwlock, wait_event_timeout, wait_event_ipc, client_backend_count, autovacuum_worker_count, parallel_worker_count, background_worker_count, long_running_queries, max_query_duration_sec, database_name, xact_commit, xact_rollback ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{totalConnections}, #{activeConnections}, #{idleConnections}, #{idleInTransaction}, #{waitingSessions}, #{waitingForLock}, #{waitingForIo}, #{waitEventClient}, #{waitEventActivity}, #{waitEventBufferpin}, #{waitEventLwlock}, #{waitEventTimeout}, #{waitEventIpc}, #{clientBackendCount}, #{autovacuumWorkerCount}, #{parallelWorkerCount}, #{backgroundWorkerCount}, #{longRunningQueries}, #{maxQueryDurationSec}, #{databaseName}, #{xactCommit}, #{xactRollback} )

INSERT INTO cpu_agg_1m ( instance_id, collected_at, avg_total_connections, avg_active_connections, avg_idle_connections, avg_idle_in_transaction, avg_waiting_sessions, avg_waiting_for_lock, avg_waiting_for_io, avg_wait_event_client, avg_wait_event_activity, avg_wait_event_bufferpin, avg_wait_event_lwlock, avg_wait_event_timeout, avg_wait_event_ipc, avg_client_backend, avg_autovacuum_worker, avg_parallel_worker, avg_background_worker, avg_long_running_queries, max_query_duration_sec, database_name, delta_xact_commit, delta_xact_rollback, xact_commit_rate, xact_rollback_rate, status ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{avgTotalConnections}, #{avgActiveConnections}, #{avgIdleConnections}, #{avgIdleInTransaction}, #{avgWaitingSessions}, #{avgWaitingForLock}, #{avgWaitingForIo}, #{avgWaitEventClient}, #{avgWaitEventActivity}, #{avgWaitEventBufferpin}, #{avgWaitEventLwlock}, #{avgWaitEventTimeout}, #{avgWaitEventIpc}, #{avgClientBackend}, #{avgAutovacuumWorker}, #{avgParallelWorker}, #{avgBackgroundWorker}, #{avgLongRunningQueries}, #{maxQueryDurationSec}, #{databaseName}, #{deltaXactCommit}, #{deltaXactRollback}, #{xactCommitRate}, #{xactRollbackRate}, #{status} )

INSERT INTO cpu_agg_5m ( instance_id, time_bucket, avg_total_connections, avg_active_connections, avg_idle_connections, avg_idle_in_transaction, avg_waiting_sessions, avg_waiting_for_lock, avg_waiting_for_io, avg_wait_event_client, avg_wait_event_activity, avg_wait_event_bufferpin, avg_wait_event_lwlock, avg_wait_event_timeout, avg_wait_event_ipc, avg_client_backend, avg_autovacuum_worker, avg_parallel_worker, avg_background_worker, avg_long_running_queries, total_xact_commit, total_xact_rollback, record_count ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{timeBucket}, #{avgTotalConnections}, #{avgActiveConnections}, #{avgIdleConnections}, #{avgIdleInTransaction}, #{avgWaitingSessions}, #{avgWaitingForLock}, #{avgWaitingForIo}, #{avgWaitEventClient}, #{avgWaitEventActivity}, #{avgWaitEventBufferpin}, #{avgWaitEventLwlock}, #{avgWaitEventTimeout}, #{avgWaitEventIpc}, #{avgClientBackend}, #{avgAutovacuumWorker}, #{avgParallelWorker}, #{avgBackgroundWorker}, #{avgLongRunningQueries}, #{totalXactCommit}, #{totalXactRollback}, #{recordCount} ) ON CONFLICT (instance_id, time_bucket) DO UPDATE SET avg_total_connections = EXCLUDED.avg_total_connections, avg_active_connections = EXCLUDED.avg_active_connections, avg_idle_connections = EXCLUDED.avg_idle_connections, avg_idle_in_transaction = EXCLUDED.avg_idle_in_transaction, avg_waiting_sessions = EXCLUDED.avg_waiting_sessions, avg_waiting_for_lock = EXCLUDED.avg_waiting_for_lock, avg_waiting_for_io = EXCLUDED.avg_waiting_for_io, avg_wait_event_client = EXCLUDED.avg_wait_event_client, avg_wait_event_activity = EXCLUDED.avg_wait_event_activity, avg_wait_event_bufferpin = EXCLUDED.avg_wait_event_bufferpin, avg_wait_event_lwlock = EXCLUDED.avg_wait_event_lwlock, avg_wait_event_timeout = EXCLUDED.avg_wait_event_timeout, avg_wait_event_ipc = EXCLUDED.avg_wait_event_ipc, avg_client_backend = EXCLUDED.avg_client_backend, avg_autovacuum_worker = EXCLUDED.avg_autovacuum_worker, avg_parallel_worker = EXCLUDED.avg_parallel_worker, avg_background_worker = EXCLUDED.avg_background_worker, avg_long_running_queries = EXCLUDED.avg_long_running_queries, total_xact_commit = EXCLUDED.total_xact_commit, total_xact_rollback = EXCLUDED.total_xact_rollback, record_count = EXCLUDED.record_count
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cpu_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
